# SafeSkill

> Scan AI tool skills for security risks and prompt injection before you install.

SafeSkill is a security scanner for the AI tool ecosystem. It analyzes MCP servers, Claude Code skills, OpenClaw tools, and any npm package for code exploits, prompt injection, data exfiltration, and description mismatches.

## Key Facts

- Indexes 10,121+ AI tool skills from npm, Smithery, GitHub, and curated lists
- 8 code security detectors (filesystem, network, env theft, process spawn, crypto, obfuscation, install scripts, dynamic require)
- 8 prompt injection detectors (instruction override, hidden unicode, data exfiltration, tool abuse, persona hijack, CoT manipulation, delimiter escape, indirect injection)
- Taint tracking: traces data from sensitive sources (SSH keys, API tokens) through transformations to network sinks
- Code-to-content correlation: detects when documentation claims contradict actual code behavior
- Scans complete in under 3 seconds
- CLI tool: `npx skillsafe scan <package>`
- Free, open source (MIT license)

## Links

- Website: https://safeskill.dev
- Browse skills: https://safeskill.dev/browse
- GitHub: https://github.com/OyadotAI/safeskill
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/skillsafe
- Blog: https://safeskill.dev/blog/we-scanned-10k-skills

## Usage

```
npx skillsafe scan @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem
npx skillsafe scan chalk
npx skillsafe install @org/mcp-server
npx skillsafe scan some-package --share
```

## Scoring

- 90-100: Verified Safe
- 70-89: Passes with Notes
- 40-69: Use with Caution
- 0-39: Blocked
